{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113355957ACCDC63F6BC104A0BB"}"},"total":31},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7526696662922593048","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个系列个人现在还是挺喜欢的，主要吧，可能也是有一定年纪了，就倾向于这种刑侦类的就好好以破案为主，就算一定要加入主角情感戏最好也不要太多。。反正现在挺反感那种大量加男女主戏，且女方一定是貌美如花身材哇塞，不管是处于哪个位置，即便是队长级，搞的好像很有能力，结果其实仍然是男主的附属品，关键场合还是要靠男人才能结束，就，挺没意思的。。更有甚的就是喜欢大量描写男女主的情感的，可，咱这是刑侦类文不是言情文啊！能不能把重点放破案上？所以，这个系列不错！作者大大一定要坚持啊！单身狗也没啥不好的哈[笑哭] 千万千万不要后续灵机一动，嘿，哥们独身太久也来点情感啥的，可以，就是千万不要本末倒置以谈情说爱为主啊！咱还是更喜欢看破案，拜托[爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752456877,"group_id":"7478571627043638297","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzeK9lX26YGFp1QCS+u9SzfE3Q6xRDltcSflD74KHCjT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4037864815078509","user_name":"想做条没烦恼的咸鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4037864815078509","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1716787568,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7478571627043638297","book_info":{"abstract":"【悬疑+刑侦+推理+单元案件+人性深渊+无CP+专注破案】
